# BAMEME Packaging - Premium B2B Jewelry Pouches & Packaging Manufacturer

BAMEME Packaging is a leading factory-direct B2B manufacturer specializing in high-end customized jewelry pouches, microfiber drawstring bags, and luxury velvet packaging for global boutique brands, Etsy creators, and Shopify retailers.

## Core Commercial Specifications

- **Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ)**: 1,000 units (Low MOQ friendly for emerging brands).
- **Maximum Order Capacity**: 50,000+ units per batch.
- **Production Lead Time**: 7-10 business days after 3D proof confirmation.
- **Shipping Policy**: Free worldwide door-to-door express air shipping (DHL/FedEx/UPS), delivering in 5-7 days globally.
- **Sample Pack**: $0 Material & Texture Sample Pack available (inspected globally with a $9.99 express shipping fee).
- **Design & Setup**: Interactive online 3D customizer for instant canvas logo positioning. 2-hour high-fidelity digital proof setup with free unlimited revisions.

## Product Material & Printing Techniques

### Materials Available
1. **Premium Microfiber (Ultra-Soft)**: Compliant with chemical safety standards. High density, non-scratch fabric that naturally polishes jewelry, rings, and premium accessories.
2. **Classic Luxurious Velvet**: Rich, thick pile texture, ideal for high-end perfume packaging, watches, and VIP gift bags.
3. **Eco Kraft & Canvas**: 100% biodegradable organic cotton canvas and craft paper options for sustainable branding.
4. **Rigid Board & Magnetic Boxes**: Structured VIP packaging.

### Custom Craft Techniques
- **Metallic Foil Hot Stamping** (Gold, Silver, Rose Gold)
- **Deep Heat Debossing & Embossing**
- **Premium Silk Screen Printing**
- **FSC-certified & Premium Eco-friendly** fabric choices.

## Verification & Trust Anchors

- **Quality Guarantee**: 100% Quality & Remake Guarantee. Defective products or printing deviation resolved via unconditional free remake.
- **Automation Pipeline**: Automatically binds online 3D canvas coordinates to Stripe checkout metadata. Direct transmission to factory manufacturing workflow, eliminating human communication error.
- **Verified B2B Orders**: Over 1,200+ completed orders worldwide with a verified client satisfaction rating of 4.9/5 stars.

## Industries Served
- Jewelry & Accessories
- Luxury Cosmetics & Perfumes
- Corporate Branding & VIP Giveaways
- Premium Tech Accessories
- High-end Watch & Eyewear Protection

## Target Contacts & Quote Route
For custom branding quotes, inquiries, and free sample packs:
- Website: https://www.bameme.com
- Main Inquiry Portal: https://www.bameme.com#inquiry-form-section
